'''Wrou'shak''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] member of the [[Clan Shak|Shak clan]] and was the brother of [[Koh'shak]], [[Elam'shak]] and [[Troa'shak]]. He served as the [[Wind Master]] at the [[Kala'uun Starport]].
